name: Butterscotch Bars #3
recipeInstructions:
1. In a double boiler over hot water, combine 1/4 cup (50 mL) Golden Crisco Shortening, butterscotch chips, peanut butter, and milk. Stir occasionally until the mixture is melted and smooth.
2. In a large bowl, combine graham cracker crumbs and chopped nuts. Pour the butterscotch mixture over the crumbs. Stir until combined.
3. Spread the mixture in an ungreased 9 x 9 x 2-inch (2.5 L) pan. Refrigerate until firm. Cut into bars measuring 3/4 x 1-3/4 inches.
4. In a double boiler over hot water, combine chocolate chips and 3 tablespoons (45 mL) Golden Crisco Shortening. Stir occasionally until the chocolate melts.
5. Place one bar at a time in melted chocolate. Turn with a fork. Lift from the chocolate on the fork, allowing excess to drip off. Place on paper-lined baking sheet. Sprinkle the top with finely chopped peanuts. Return to refrigerator to harden chocolate. Makes: 5-1/2 to 6 dozen bars. 1 pkg/12 oz (350g) Peanut Butter Chips may be substituted for Butterscotch Chips.
